metadata.description: HNSW vector search, graph algorithms (BFS/DFS/PageRank/Leiden/centrality), Node2Vec embeddings, GGUF embedding and LLM chat/extraction — all inside SQLite via a single C11 extension.

plugins.name: muninn
plugins.description: Nine task-granular agent skills for the sqlite-muninn extension: setup, HNSW vector search, GGUF text embedding, LLM chat/extraction, graph algorithms, dbt-style lineage (graph_select), Node2Vec, GraphRAG pipelines, and troubleshooting. Covers SQLite CLI, C, Python, Node.js, and WASM runtimes.
